summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Auto Platform Admin Panel P1 features: Audit Log UI, Global Search (Cmd+K), Notifications Admin with bulk send, and Reports & Export with KPIs and CSV functionality
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with stats and KPI metrics
Audit Log page displays with filters (actor, entityType, date range)
Global Search opens with Cmd+K keyboard shortcut
Global Search finds 'BMW' and shows results
Notifications page loads with tabs (Send, Templates, History)
Notifications bulk send form works with filters
Reports page loads with KPIs tab showing metrics
Reports tabs work (KPIs, Revenue, Bookings, Providers, Conversion)
CSV Export dropdown works for multiple entities
Sidebar navigation to all new pages works
All backend APIs return correct responses
No JavaScript errors or console warnings
